question: Quels variants de boutons definir dans un design system ?

principles.text: 5 variants: primary (filled, 1 par section), secondary (outlined), tertiary/ghost (text-only), danger (filled red), icon-only (avec aria-label + tooltip). Tous les variants: 5 etats (enabled, hover, focus, pressed, disabled). Un seul primary par section pour guider l'action principale.

sources.name: Carbon Design System Buttons
sources.quote: Primary, secondary, tertiary, danger, and ghost button types

sources.name: EightShapes Buttons in Design Systems
sources.quote: Limit to one primary button per section for clear hierarchy

sources.name: M3 Button Types
sources.quote: Filled, outlined, text, elevated, and tonal button variants

sources.name: NNg Button States
sources.quote: All button variants need consistent state treatment

sources.name: SubUX Button Hierarchy
sources.quote: Visual weight of button indicates importance in the action hierarchy
